The '''Corellian butterfly''' was a butterfly that lived in the swamps of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. It had a long tail containing a stinger, and very large wings.

==Description==
Corellian butterflies can be classified in several castes: drones, workers, warriors, defenders, and monarchs. While the drones were peaceful, the defenders were known to be aggressive.<ref name="SWG:CB">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=loading|Corellian Butterflies|Corellia}}</ref>

Corellian butterfly meat was comestible. The cookbook ''[[Essential Cooking Skills]]'' detailed how to best cook that meat.<ref name="SWG:ECS">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=item|ESSENTIAL COOKING SKILLS}}</ref>

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Butterfly_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Corellian butterflies appeared in the video game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
